text.title: Handover Pack Template Outsource Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the Handover Pack Template Outsource artefact. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: missing outgoing_specialist + receiving_owner + runbooks + contacts; decision lacks decided_on/source/rationale; open issue lacks owner_after_handover/expected_by; acceptance gate self-acknowledged.

antipattern.description: Status set to an approved/sent state by the producing agent without a human reviewer entry.
Required field empty or replaced with a placeholder (n/a, unknown) without an anchored reason.
Prose paragraph stuffed into a field the schema declares as array or object.
